description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with white and gray exterior walls. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and lush landscaping, including palm trees and shrubs, providing privacy and a touch of greenery. A driveway leads to the front entrance, and there is a visible outdoor pool area with a shaded patio structure. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light inside. The backyard includes a spacious open area, ideal for recreation or relaxation. The overall layout is compact yet luxurious, with a focus on outdoor living and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and gray walls, wooden fencing, palm landscaping, and a backyard pool area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and lush palm landscaping along the wooden fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open backyard, pool area, and shaded patio structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio cover, and the driveway extending along the fence.
